umn widths with heading widths. foreach $col (@headings) { $width{$col} = length ($col); } # Determine which columns are numeric. foreach $col (@headings) { if (AssignmentExists ($col) || $IS_CATEGORY{$col}) { $numFormat{$col} = 1; } }

_CATEGORY{$col}) { $numFormat{$col} = 1; } } $numFormat{'Total'} = 1; # Collect all results in @grades. while ( ) { @line = split (/\s+/); undef %vals; ($vals{'Login'}, $vals{'Last'}, $vals{'First'}, $vals{'SID'}) = @line;

ast'}, $vals{'First'}, $vals{'SID'}) = @line; next if (!$vals{'Login'}); $vals{'Name'} = "$vals{'Last'}, $vals{'First'}"; if ($needCode) { $vals{'Code'} = GetCode ($vals{'Login'}); } foreach $assgn (@ASSIGNMENT_LIST) { if (ex

scores, $vals{$assgn}); } } if ($THROW_OUT_LOWEST{$category}) { @scores = sort { $a <=> $b } @scores; splice @scores, 0, $THROW_OUT_LOWEST{$category}; } $vals{$category} = 0; foreach (@scores) { $vals{$category} += $_; } $v

ch (@scores) { $vals{$category} += $_; } $vals{'Total'} += $vals{$category}; } $k = $worst; $score = $vals{'Total'}; for ($i = 0; $i <= $#minScores; $i += 1) { if ($score >= $minScores[$i] && $minScores[$i] > $minScores[$

>= $minScores[$i] && $minScores[$i] > $minScores[$k]) { $k = $i; } } $vals{'Grade'} = $letterGrades[$k]; if (exists ($vals{$opt_s})) { $line = lc ($vals{$opt_s}); } else { Fatal ("No column $opt_s."); } if ($opt_x) {

al ("No column $opt_s."); } if ($opt_x) { if ($OSID{$vals{'SID'}} =~ /^.?$/) { $vals{'SID'} = $vals{'Login'}; } else { $vals{'SID'} = $OSID{$vals{'SID'}}; } } foreach $col (@headings) { $val = $vals{$col}; if (

each $col (@headings) { $val = $vals{$col}; if ($numFormat{$col} && $val =~ /-?[0-9.]+/) { $len = 5; } else { $len = length ($val); } if ($len > $width{$col}) { $width{$col} = $len; } $line .= "\t$vals{$col}"; } push (@

; } $line .= "\t$vals{$col}"; } push (@lines, $line); } # Sort results by key. @lines = sort (@lines); if ($opt_o) { open (STDOUT, ">$opt_o") || Fatal ("Could not open $opt_o: $!"); } # Determine column formats. foreach $col (@hea

} # Determine column formats. foreach $col (@headings) { if ($numFormat{$col}) { $numFormat{$col} = "%$width{$col}.1f "; $strFormat{$col} = "%$width{$col}s "; } else { $strFormat{$col} = "%-$width{$col}s "; } } # Now print, with a n

"%-$width{$col}s "; } } # Now print, with a new page every 50 lines $n = 0; foreach (@lines) { @line = split ("\t"); shift (@line); if ($n % 50 == 0) { print "\f" if ($n > 0); foreach $col (@headings) { printf "%-$width{$col}s

ch $col (@headings) { printf "%-$width{$col}s ", (" " x (($width{$col}-length($col))/2)) . $col; } print "\n"; foreach $col (@headings) { printf "%s ", ("-" x $width{$col}); } print "\n"; } foreach $col (@headings) { $v

nt "\n"; } foreach $col (@headings) { $val = shift (@line); $len = $width{$col}; if ($numFormat{$col} && $val =~ /-?[0-9]*(\.[0-9]*)?/) { printf $numFormat{$col}, $val; } else { printf $strFormat{$col}, $val; } } print
printf $strFormat{$col}, $val; } } print "\n"; $n += 1; } exit 0;
